title: Ferny Spreading Blossom: batch 19 curation dispositioned
body: Closed claim 5c371349-df9b-4e65-9667-7b431da37531 after processing legacy backlog batch 19 in place. Disposition: 5 items total, 2 duplicate and 3 owner-gated. Owner-gated register is now 43 items.
